nasb.text: “Nevertheless, I will remember My covenant with you in the days of your youth, and I will establish an everlasting covenant with you.

esv.text: yet I will remember my covenant with you in the days of your youth, and I will establish for you an everlasting covenant.

cnv.text: “‘但我仍要記念在你年幼的時候與你所立的約，也要與你堅立永遠的約。

ccb.text: 然而，我顾念在你幼年时与你所立的约，我要与你立一个永远的约。
